basic_details.job_title: STPINEXT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Lab Engineers, Chief Operating Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Chief Operating Officer, Incubation Manager, Finance & Admin Executive, Lab Engineers
basic_details.short_information: STPINEXT has published the Chief Operating Officer, Incubation Manager, Finance & Admin Executive, Lab Engineers Recruitment 2026 notification in 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 5 vacancies under this notification. Candidates within the age limit of below 35–45 years (with applicable relaxation) and holding qualifications such as Graduate, B.Tech/BE, MBA, and Post-Graduation are eligible to apply online at the official website. The application closes on or before 09 July 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Chief Operating Officer (COO): Below 45 years. Relaxation permissible for deserving candidates. Incubation Manager (IM): Below 35 years. Relaxation permissible for deserving candidates. Finance & Admin Executive (F&AE): Below 35 years. Relaxation permissible for deserving candidates. Lab Engineer: Below 35 years. Relaxation permissible for deserving candidates.

qualification.details: Chief Operating Officer (COO): Bachelor in Technology/Engineering (or equivalent degree) or Master in Technology/Engineering/Science or MBA from a recognized, accredited and reputed institute/university. Minimum 8 years of overall experience in the IT/Electronics industry, start-up ecosystem as co-founder/founder/CxO and/ or as an enabler of Start-up, Innovation & entrepreneurship ecosystem. Incubation Manager (IM): Graduate from a recognized university. Desirable: Post-Graduation in Management. 5+ years of work experience including minimum 3 years of experience in incubation management & Incubation Ecosystem. Finance & Admin Executive (F&AE): Graduate from a recognized university. Desirable: Post-Graduation in Management. Minimum 3 years of work experience in the relevant field. Lab Engineer: Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics/Instrumentation or equivalent from a recognized university. Desirable: Post-Graduation in Electronics /Instrumentation or equivalent. Minimum 3 years of work experience in the relevant field.

salary_details.finance & admin executive (f&ae): ₹ 25,000/- (Higher remuneration may be considered for deserving candidates)

selection_process: Screening by a duly constituted ‘Screening Committee’ Personal interview before the duly constituted 'Selection Committee'
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the STPINEXT Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of STPINEXT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.stpinext: Chief Operating Officer, Incubation Manager, Finance & Admin Executive, Lab Engineers

content_sections.heading: STPINEXT Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the STPINEXT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download STPINEXT Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: STPINEXT Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Chief Operating Officer (COO): Bachelor in Technology/Engineering (or equivalent degree) or Master in Technology/Engineering/Science or MBA from a recognized, accredited and reputed institute/university. Minimum 8 years of overall experience in the IT/Electronics industry, start-up ecosystem as co-founder/founder/CxO and/ or as an enabler of Start-up, Innovation & entrepreneurship ecosystem. Incubation Manager (IM): Graduate from a recognized university. Desirable: Post-Graduation in Management. 5+ years of work experience including minimum 3 years of experience in incubation management & Incubation Ecosystem. Finance & Admin Executive (F&AE): Graduate from a recognized university. Desirable: Post-Graduation in Management. Minimum 3 years of work experience in the relevant field. Lab Engineer: Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics/Instrumentation or equivalent from a recognized university. Desirable: Post-Graduation in Electronics /Instrumentation or equivalent. Minimum 3 years of work experience in the relevant field.

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: STPINEXT Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Chief Operating Officer (COO): Below 45 years. Relaxation permissible for deserving candidates. Incubation Manager (IM): Below 35 years. Relaxation permissible for deserving candidates. Finance & Admin Executive (F&AE): Below 35 years. Relaxation permissible for deserving candidates. Lab Engineer: Below 35 years. Relaxation permissible for deserving candidates.

rows.salary_per_month: ₹ 25,000/- (Higher remuneration may be considered for deserving candidates)

rows.event: Last date for submission of application

content_sections.heading: STPINEXT Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening by a duly constituted ‘Screening Committee’ Personal interview before the duly constituted 'Selection Committee'

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the STPINEXT Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of STPINEXT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for STPINEXT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the STPINEXT recruitment is 09 July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in STPINEXT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for various posts including Chief Operating Officer, Incubation Manager, Finance & Admin Executive, and Lab Engineers.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Lab Engineer post?
faq.answer: For the Lab Engineer post, a Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics/Instrumentation or equivalent from a recognized university is required. Post-Graduation in Electronics/Instrumentation is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Chief Operating Officer (COO) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Operating Officer (COO) position is 45 years. However, relaxation is permissible for deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Incubation Manager post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Incubation Manager post will receive a monthly salary of ₹55,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for STPINEXT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official STPINEXT website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are offered on a contract basis for the 'Smart Agri' Centre of Entrepreneurship (CoE).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for STPINEXT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening by a duly constituted Screening Committee, followed by a personal interview before the Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the STPINEXT located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the 'Smart Agri' Centre of Entrepreneurship (CoE) located in Bhilai, Chhattisgarh, with pincode 490020.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with a Bachelor's degree apply for any post?
faq.answer: Yes, a graduate degree is the minimum qualification for some posts like Incubation Manager and Finance & Admin Executive. For COO, higher qualifications are required, and for Lab Engineer, a specific engineering degree is necessary.
